news.t: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands Growing ETF Lineup with the Harbor Active Small Cap ETF

holdings.infoBox: SMLL is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Reliance stock at 5.47%, WillScot Holdings at 4.95%, Pool Corporation at 4.75%, Wintrust Financial at 4.05%, and Douglas Dynamics at 3.94%.

overview.description: The Harbor Active Small Cap ETF (SMLL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is actively managed, investing in small capitalization companies in the US. The fund utilizes proprietary analysis to select firms that demonstrate strong cash flow and competitive advantages SMLL was launched on Aug 28, 2024 and is issued by Harbor.

data.title: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands Growing ETF Lineup with the Harbor Active Small Cap ETF
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors, Inc. ("Harbor"), an asset manager that curates a suite of actively-managed ETFs, mutual funds, and collective investment trusts, has added the Harbor...
